subject: feat(pwa): adopt glow-props PWA patterns — install detection, update control, race fix
body:
Implements three patterns from the glow-props shared reference:

1. beforeinstallprompt race condition fix: Inline script in index.html
   captures the event before React mounts, so repeat visitors with a
   cached service worker don't lose the install prompt.

2. Browser-specific install flow: New usePWAInstall hook detects browser
   type (Chrome/Edge/Brave/Safari/Firefox) and routes to the right UX.
   Chromium gets native install; Safari/Firefox get an
   InstallInstructionsModal with per-browser step-by-step guides.
   Install analytics tracked in localStorage (last 50 events).

3. User-controlled SW updates: Switched from registerType 'autoUpdate'
   to 'prompt' via new usePWAUpdate hook. Users see a blue banner when
   an update is available and choose when to apply it — no more
   mid-session reloads. Checks for new SW versions every 60 minutes.
   Offline-ready notification auto-dismisses after 3 seconds.

Also adds glow-props as a shared reference in CLAUDE.md with fetch URL
and list of adopted patterns.

Tags: pwa, install, update, ux, glow-props
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-hardening
